header.tagline: A colorful, safe challenge world for kids
nav.desc.askExpert: Kids-focused expert support and category selection.
sidebar.legal.title: Marifetli Kids legal
landing.footerTrust: Parent-approved signup · Respect for your data · Have fun
landing.modalHelp: Pick a tab and enter your credentials.
landing.feature.connect.title: Connect instantly
landing.feature.connect.body: Teacher, parent, and student stay in one flow with feedback and notifications.
landing.feature.window.title: Open a window into their world
landing.feature.window.body: Capture class energy through challenge submissions and free posts.
landing.feature.calendar.title: Stay on top of events
landing.feature.calendar.body: Track upcoming deadlines and announcements like a calendar.
landing.feature.grow.title: Help them grow their own way
landing.feature.grow.body: With badge road, challenge progress, and games, kids progress at their own pace.
landing.feature.classroom.title: Build your best classroom
landing.feature.classroom.body: Manage invites, challenges, and reviews from one teacher panel.
landing.heroSubtitle: Complete your teacher challenges, shine in freestyle, and progress on the badge road - all in one safe kid-friendly place.
landing.card.challengesBody: Submit with text, image, or video; teacher feedback appears right in your panel.
landing.card.freestyleBody: Share your own ideas and shine beyond the classroom.
landing.card.badgeBody: Progress, celebrate, and stay motivated with gamified mini wins.
landing.game.title: Learn easier with games
landing.game.body: Learn while having fun with memory, addition, subtraction, multiplication, and division games. Level up, build combos, complete daily tasks, and earn badges.
landing.studentCardBody: Register via invite link and join your class. Use the button below or login modal.
landing.teacherCardBody: Class/challenge management, invites, and star of the week - account is opened by admin.
landing.studentModalHint: Use the username or email address provided by your school.
landing.parentModalHint: Parent account opens with the email and password created during class invite sign-up.
landing.teacherModalHint: Your account must be created by an administrator.
landing.studentLoginSubtitle: Sign-up is only through teacher invite.
landing.parentLoginSubtitle: Use the parent email/password set during invite registration.
landing.teacherLoginSubtitle: Use your email/password to manage class and challenges.
landing.homeV2.dailyBody: How about building your own rocket from recyclables at home? Use your imagination and get ready for takeoff!
landing.homeV2.heroSubtitle: We blend curiosity with technology and pedagogy. Marifetli Kids is here for kids who learn with joy and grow by exploring.
landing.homeV2.z1.title: Publish tests instantly with AI
landing.homeV2.z1.body: Curriculum-aligned, personalized tests in seconds—with AI. Content adapts to each learner.
landing.homeV2.z2.title: Manage homework from one panel
landing.homeV2.z2.body: No more messy lists—track tasks and celebrate every win.
landing.homeV2.z3.title: Instant parent messaging
landing.homeV2.z3.body: Fast, secure chat. Share progress updates and stay connected.
landing.homeV2.z4.title: Expert support with AI
landing.homeV2.z4.body: Get AI-powered expert answers on learning and development; track progress with data and reach help whenever you need it.
landing.homeV2.game1.title: Math Quest
landing.homeV2.game2.title: Science Lab
landing.homeV2.game3.title: Language Explorer
landing.homeV2.game3.body: Learn languages with fun word hunts.
landing.homeV2.parentBody: Set screen time, pick age-appropriate content, and follow their progress in a safe space. Peace of mind with Marifetli Kids.
landing.homeV2.immersiveBody: Let your imagination run free, have fun while you learn, and grab a new badge to earn every day.
landing.homeV2.bentoCourseBody: Move at your own pace and explore any topic freely. You set the limits in your learning!
landing.homeV2.bentoBadgeBody: Complete quests, collect rare badges, and show your wins on your profile.
landing.homeV2.z5.title: Class announcements
landing.homeV2.z5.body: Share important news and event updates with the whole class or specific student groups in seconds. Stay on top with read confirmations.
kidsLogin.checkEmailBody: Look for the reset link in your inbox or spam folder. The link is valid for about 1 hour.
kidsLogin.resetHintStudent: We send a one-time link to the email on your Kids student account.
kidsLogin.resetHintStaff: We send a reset link to your Marifetli account email (same as main site).
kidsLogin.wrongRole: This page is not for your selected account type.
profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: You can update your name and upload a profile photo.
profile.file.typeError: Please select JPEG, PNG, or WebP.
profile.file.sizeError: File size must be at most 2 MB.
profile.photo.hint: JPEG, PNG, or WebP · up to 2 MB
profile.language.hint.free: You will see Kids in this language.
profile.language.hint.locked: Student language is automatically set by the class language setting.
student.panel.toast.title: Great news from your teacher!
student.announcements.pageSubtitle: Follow the latest news, upcoming events, and important updates from the academy here.
student.announcements.sortHint: Newest announcements are at the top; pinned ones always appear first.
parent.announcements.pageSubtitle: Follow your child's class and school announcements here.
student.dashboard.heroBody: Follow your badge path and manage challenges on their own page — your teacher's star is with you.
student.dashboard.growthHint1: Earn points for the Filiz badge (6 GP)
student.dashboard.growthHint2: Keep going for the Gelişen badge (16 GP)
student.dashboard.growthHint3: Almost at the Parlayan badge (30 GP)
student.dashboard.growthHint5: Close to 80 GP and top badges
student.dashboard.classesEmpty: You are not enrolled in a class yet — join with your teacher's invite link.
student.dashboard.challengesBody: Multi-step challenges save each submission separately. Open the full list and your progress here.
student.dashboard.heroBodyPanel: A new adventure awaits today. Keep an eye on your reading goals and badge path!
student.dashboard.badgesEmpty: Badge path is not available yet.
student.dashboard.certificatesEmpty: No certificates yet — keep working on weekly and monthly goals.
student.dashboard.dailyChallengeBodyWith: Finish and submit this task to grow your points.
student.dashboard.dailyChallengeFallback: Open your challenge list, move step by step, and wait for teacher feedback.
student.projects.pageSubtitle: Each card is an adventure — submit step by step, get feedback, collect stars.
student.projects.noAssignments: No challenges are live right now.
student.projects.emptyOngoingDescDone: You have finished the required submissions for all published challenges. Check the Completed tab for summaries.
student.projects.emptyDoneDesc: Challenges where you sent all required steps appear here. Start from the In progress tab.
student.projects.emptyExpiredDesc: Challenges past the deadline that you left incomplete appear here.
student.projects.streakBodyNeed: Complete {n} more challenges this week to unlock special rewards!
student.projects.streakBodyGreat: You're crushing it this week — keep going!
student.starOverlay.title: Teacher's star!
student.starOverlay.body: You are among the standout submissions in this challenge — well done!
student.motivation.mid0: Nice work! You finished this step — you'll shine on the next one too.
student.motivation.mid1: You put in effort and it shows; the adventure goes on.
student.motivation.mid2: Awesome! Each step makes you stronger; keep going.
student.motivation.mid3: Bravo! Your teacher will see your effort; shine on the next step too.
student.motivation.mid4: Great job! Small steps lead to big wins — keep it up.
student.motivation.mid5: Well done! This round is done; take a breath and move to the next step.
student.motivation.final0: You finished every step! You're a star — be proud.
student.motivation.final1: You completed the topic from start to end. Filiz is cheering!
student.motivation.final2: Last step done! You crowned this challenge — amazing.
teacher.panel.academicYearRequired: Academic year must be set for this school.
teacher.panel.duplicateClass: A similar class exists in this school. You can join that class.
teacher.panel.subtitle: Select your school, open your class, and start today's adventure.
teacher.panel.pendingTasksHint: Challenges, homework, or class competition approvals — click a row to open the class. Scroll inside the card if the list is long.
teacher.panel.pendingTasksNoClasses: Add a class first to see your task summary.
teacher.panel.communityDesc: Swap ideas, materials, and morale in one place.
teacher.panel.whichSchoolHint: This class will be linked to the selected school.
teacher.panel.academicYearHint: This value comes automatically from admin settings.
parent.panel.chatUpdateRequired: Update required. Refresh and try again.
parent.panel.title: Parent panel
parent.panel.subtitle: Track your child's progress, feedback, and approvals here.
parent.panel.dashboardHeroSubtitle: Track your children's performance and progress from here.
parent.panel.dashboardSwitchSubtitle: Jump into child mode quickly to do activities together.
parent.panel.dashboardSafeBody: Filters are on. Children can only access approved content.
notifications.title: What's new?
notifications.subtitle: Follow your students' successes and updates.
messages.title: Messages
messages.subtitle: Parent and teacher conversations are listed here.
messages.passwordModalBody: Enter your account password to view parent messages.
messageDetail.imageTooLarge: Image can be at most 10 MB
messageDetail.fileTooLarge: File can be at most 20 MB
messageDetail.startConversation: Send the first message to start the conversation.
messageDetail.messagePlaceholder: Write a message... (Enter: send, Shift+Enter: new line)
announcements.title: Announcements
announcements.pageSubtitle: Manage school communications and keep parents updated.
announcements.categoryHint: Choose whether this is an Event, Information, or General announcement; shown as the card badge.
announcements.classRequired: You must select a class for announcement.
announcements.assignClassFirst: You must be assigned to a class first.
announcements.attachmentHint: You can add multiple files. Image 10 MB, document 20 MB.
announcements.noExistingAttachment: No existing attachment on this announcement.
announcements.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this announcement?
tests.studentReport.loadError: Student detail could not be loaded
tests.studentReport.testUnassigned: This test is not assigned to a class yet; distribute it before opening a student report.
tests.studentReport.notSubmittedYet: This student has not submitted the test yet.
roadmap.title: Badge road
roadmap.subtitle: Each node is a badge. Points never decrease; challenge stars keep accumulating.
roadmap.challengeStarsHint: Highlighted submissions picked by teacher. Max {limit} stars per challenge.
roadmap.heroSubtitle: Keep exploring and collect your new badges!
roadmap.challengeStarsBody: Every completed challenge gives you extra stars. Collect {goal} to unlock special rewards!
roadmap.emptyMilestones: Badge path is not loaded yet.

student.growthStage.explorer.subtitle: Every project is a new step.

student.growthStage.sprout.subtitle: Small steps build the whole path.

tests.reports.testNotAssignedToClass: This test is not assigned to a class yet; distribute it first or pick a class from the list.
tests.reports.question: question
tests.reports.title: Reports
tests.reports.subtitle: Select class and test to open a report.
tests.reports.noTests: No reportable tests in this class.
tests.reports.selectTestHint: Select a test below to see the report.
tests.studentList.title: Tests
tests.studentList.empty: There are no assigned tests right now.
tests.studentList.emptySubmitted: You have not submitted any tests yet.
tests.studentList.heroSubtitle: Your tests — finish goals to earn badges!
tests.studentList.streakSubtitle: Keep solving to grow your XP and badge path. You've got this!
tests.studentList.milestoneTeaserBody: Finish tests and tasks to unlock badges and earn growth points.
tests.studentList.milestoneAllUnlockedBo: Amazing progress. Check your badge path for teacher picks and new goals.
tests.studentSolve.autoSubmitted: Time is up, test was submitted automatically
tests.studentSolve.noAnswer: You did not answer this question.
tests.studentSolve.readingAnswerPrompt: Answer the questions below based on the text you read.
tests.teacherMain.imageSizeError: Some images were skipped due to size limit (max 12MB).
tests.teacherMain.selectTestFirst: Select a test to distribute first
tests.teacherMain.selectAtLeastOneClass: Select at least one target class
tests.teacherMain.classesAlreadyAssigned: Selected classes are already assigned or same class
tests.teacherMain.uploadAtLeastOneImage: You must upload at least one image
tests.teacherMain.needAtLeastOneQuestion: At least one question is required
tests.teacherMain.invalidQuestions: Each question needs a stem. Multiple-choice items need at least two choices and a correct option; written-answer items need an expected answer.
tests.teacherMain.savedAndCanDistribute: Test saved. Open Distribute to classes to send it.
tests.teacherMain.title: Tests
tests.teacherMain.subtitle: Upload test images, convert with AI, edit, and send to class.
tests.teacherMain.cardCreateBody: Start from a blank draft: upload pages, run AI extraction, edit, and save.
tests.teacherMain.cardDistributeBody: Send a saved test to multiple class rosters in one go.
tests.teacherMain.cardReportsBody: Review performance and student insights on the reports screen.
tests.teacherMain.dropzoneSub: JPG, PNG, WebP, or PDF. Images up to 12 MB each; PDF up to 30 MB. Up to 3 source pages total. PDFs are converted to page images automatically.
tests.teacherMain.classForTestHint: New tests are saved to the class you pick. When editing, the test's class is loaded.
tests.teacherMain.pickClassHint: Choose the class for this test in this window.
tests.teacherMain.distributeDurationNote: Copies created for each class use the duration set above.
tests.teacherMain.editViaSelectHint: To edit, pick a test above; change questions below and tap Update.
tests.teacherMain.distributeHint: You can send one test to multiple classes.
tests.teacherMain.durationHint: This value is the saved duration for the test.
tests.teacherMain.noUploadedTests: You have no uploaded tests yet.
tests.teacherMain.uploadHelp: JPG/PNG/WebP or PDF. Up to 10 source pages. PDFs are rendered to PNG in the browser and saved as source pages with the test.
tests.teacherMain.uploadHint: You can upload multiple pages (example: 2-3 pages). Send separate tests for different classes.
tests.teacherMain.generateSubtitle: Upload a PDF or TXT; AI will create the number of questions you choose.
tests.teacherMain.generateMaxFiles: You can upload at most 3 files.
tests.teacherMain.generateDropzone: Drag & drop a PDF, image or TXT file
tests.teacherMain.generateDropzoneSub: PDF, JPG, PNG or plain text (.txt). Up to 3 files, 20 MB each.
tests.teacherMain.generateUnsupportedTyp: Only PDF or TXT files are allowed.
tests.teacherMain.step3: 3) Edit questions and set correct answers
tests.teacherMain.noQuestionsHint: Use AI extraction or add an empty question and fill it in manually.
tests.teacherMain.deleteQuestionModalBod: You are about to remove question {n} from the draft. There are {count} questions in the list. Changes are not saved to the server until you save.
tests.teacherMain.constructedAnswerHint: Number or short text. Grading ignores extra spaces and letter case.
tests.teacherMain.mcChoiceCountHint: Up to 5 options (A–E); you have {n} now.
tests.teacherMain.questionIllustrationHi: PNG, JPG, or WebP; up to 5 MB. Shown above the question text.
tests.teacherMain.sourcePageHelp: If you uploaded multiple pages, pick which image this question belongs to.
tests.teacherMain.publicationModalHint: Duration is set when you distribute the test to classes. Class and duration are not required when saving a draft.
tests.teacherMain.noUploadedTestsDistrib: No saved tests yet; save a test below first. Publication settings above are always available.
tests.teacherMain.deleteTestModalBody: You are about to permanently delete this test. It cannot be deleted if any student has an attempt.
tests.teacherMain.editorSaveHint: After saving, you can distribute the test to classes.
tests.teacherMain.distributeUpdatedNoNew: Test updated; no new copies were created.
tests.teacherMain.distributeUnassignedFi: Test was not assigned to a class yet; it was assigned as the master copy to the first class you selected.
tests.teacherMain.linkQuestionToPassage: Which passage does this question belong to?
tests.teacherMain.readingPassagesEmptyHi: Leave empty if there is no shared story. Use Add passage or rely on AI extraction.
tests.teacherMain.savedSourceSliderHint: Tap for fullscreen and to move between pages.
tests.teacherMain.unsupportedFileType: Only images (JPG, PNG, WebP) or PDF files are allowed.
tests.teacherMain.maxSourcePagesReached: You can add at most 10 source pages.
tests.teacherMain.pdfConvertFailed: Could not convert PDF to images.
lessonDocs.title: Lesson documents
lessonDocs.subtitle: Upload a file, add a title and note, and send it to selected classes.
lessonDocs.descriptionPlaceholder: Add a short note for students...
lessonDocs.folderHint: Optional. A folder with this name is created in each selected class if it does not exist.
lessonDocs.newFolderPlaceholder: If filled, this name is used instead of the list
lessonDocs.pageSubtitle: Organize lesson materials with smart folders and distribute them to selected classes in one step. Students see shared files right away.
lessonDocs.emptyFoldersHint: No folders yet. Enter a folder path when you upload; folders are created in the classes you pick at share time. New folder lets you type the name first, then upload.
lessonDocs.newFolderModalHint: Enter the folder name, then upload your file and choose classes in the share step. The folder is only created in the classes you select.
lessonDocs.uploadStep1Hint: Add the file, title, and optional folder first. You will pick classes in the next step.
lessonDocs.uploadStep2Hint: Select the classes to share with, then tap Distribute.
lessonDocs.browseEmptyFolder: This folder has no subfolders or files yet.
lessonDocs.subfolderModalHint: A new folder is created inside the folder you are viewing.
lessonDocs.folderNotInClass: No root folder with this name exists in the selected class.
lessonDocs.deleteFolderConfirmCascade: This folder, all subfolders, and all files inside will be permanently deleted. Continue?
tests.studentSolve.readingMissingHint: This test looks like it is based on a reading passage, but the passage is missing. You can let your teacher know.
reset.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters.
reset.invalidLinkBody: Password reset link is missing or invalid.
reset.redirecting: Redirecting to the page with login modal...
reset.newPasswordSubtitle: Set a new password for your Marifetli Kids account (student or teacher).
homework.celebration.title: Nice work!
homework.celebration.sent: Your homework was sent for parent review.
homework.celebration.noNewPoints: No new points this time—you already earned them. Still sent to your parent. Keep going!
homework.celebration.motivate0: Keep it up—you're on a roll!
homework.celebration.motivate1: Small steps lead to big wins.
homework.title: My Homeworks
homework.imageWillUploadOnDone: Image will be uploaded when you tap Done.
homework.doneRequiresImage: Add at least one student image to mark as done.
homework.motivationTitle: Ready to be this week's star?
homework.motivationBody: Finish all your homework to earn the 'Weekly Hero' badge.
homework.futureTasksEmpty: No more queued tasks to show here — pending ones are in the cards above.
homework.statXpExplain: Total growth points from your profile (server).
competitions.mustSelectDates: You must select start and end dates.
competitions.mustSelectValidDatetime: You must select a valid date and time.
competitions.endAfterStart: End time must be after start time.
competitions.minDuration: Competition must be at least 30 minutes.
competitions.endInFuture: End time must be in the future.
competitions.sentToParent: Your proposal was sent to the parent account. You will be notified after approval.
competitions.sentToTeacher: Your proposal was sent to the teacher. You will be notified after approval.
competitions.title: Competitions
competitions.freeCompBody: not tied to class; you join only with parent approval.
competitions.teacherHomeworkNote: (Teacher homework is in the Challenges page.)
competitions.windowClosed: Competition window is closed or not started yet; you cannot accept.
competitions.topicHint: All rounds are grouped under this title (like teacher homework).
competitions.roundCountLabel: How many separate challenge rounds for this topic?
competitions.roundCountHint: Shown as Challenge 1, Challenge 2 in student panel (1-5).
competitions.startDateTimeHint: Invites/joins stay closed until this time; saved using server time.
competitions.endDateTimeHint: After this time, invite accepts and new invites are disabled (min 30 minutes).
schools.saved: School saved - you can select it while creating class.
schools.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this school? It cannot be deleted if classes are attached.
schools.title: My schools
teacherClass.assignments.newSubtitle: For image submissions, student uploads 1 image per round.
teacherClass.assignments.videoEnabled: You can also allow video submissions.
teacherClass.assignments.videoDisabled: Video submissions are disabled in this setup.
teacherClass.assignments.title: Title
teacherClass.assignments.materialsPlaceh: You can write as a list
teacherClass.assignments.openAtHint: If start time is in the future, challenge stays planned until then; students see it at start time.
teacherClass.assignments.closeAtHint: Students can submit only until this time.
teacherClass.assignments.rulesHint: How should students submit this challenge?
teacherClass.assignments.imageModeHint: Submit with text and image; 1 image per round.
teacherClass.assignments.videoLimitHint: Uploaded/shared video should not exceed this limit.
teacherClass.assignments.roundCount: How many separate challenge submissions for this topic?
teacherClass.assignments.roundCountHint: Shown as Challenge 1, Challenge 2 on student panel (1-5).
teacherClass.assignments.heroSubtitle: Create a curated learning journey for your class.
teacherClass.assignments.categoryIconHin: Chooses the colored header strip and small tag on each challenge card (e.g. Visual arts). This is decorative only—not your lesson subject or a required category.
teacherClass.assignments.purposePlacehol: Write challenge details and instructions here…
teacherClass.assignments.materialsVisual: Add material tags as reminders; file upload is not in this step.
teacherClass.assignments.emptyFiltered: No challenges match this filter. Choose All or change the filter.
teacherClass.assignments.kpiSuccessFoot: Your class name — a quick morale boost alongside participation.
teacherClass.assignments.draftPlaceholde: Reserved for your next idea — draft your next curriculum spark here.
teacherClass.assignments.impactBody: Points reflect growth and badges; they grow as students submit challenges.
teacherClass.assignments.tipBody: Short group reflections after science-style challenges can boost retention.
teacherClass.assignments.listHint: Planned challenges appear at start time. Open ones are visible now in student panel.
teacherClass.assignments.plannedHint: Students are notified around start time.
teacherClass.invite.title: Parent invite
teacherClass.invite.subtitle: Create a class-specific signup link and share it via WhatsApp, SMS or class group.
teacherClass.invite.linkValidityHint: Create a new link when it expires.
teacherClass.invite.shareableLinkHint: Share this address with parents. Multiple families can use it until expiry.
teacherClass.invite.emailSubtitle: Enter parent emails to send one-time signup links from the system.
teacherClass.invite.emailDisabled: Bulk email invite is disabled by institution settings; use the invite link above.
teacherClass.invite.heroLead: One link is enough for parent signup and pairing with their children so everyone can track progress together.
teacherClass.invite.heroFeature1: Follow daily activities in near real time.
teacherClass.invite.heroFeature2: Get homework and announcements without delay.
teacherClass.invite.heroFeature3: Reach the teacher in a secure environment.
teacherClass.invite.qrScanHint: Parents can scan with the phone camera to open the same link.
teacherClass.invite.recentEmpty: You have not created a shareable link yet.
teacherClass.students.title: Enrolled students
teacherClass.students.subtitle: Each row shows published challenge count and how many were submitted at least once.
teacherClass.students.emptyDesc: Students who register with invite link or email invite appear here.
teacherClass.students.pageSubtitle: Track student progress, send messages, and manage the class list.
teacherClass.students.statParticipationH: Class average of per-student submission rate when challenges are published.
teacherClass.general.title: Class details
teacherClass.general.subtitle: Update class name, description and linked school. School assignments are managed from admin panel.
teacherClass.general.schoolHint: Province/district/neighborhood are only in school card; not entered again on class.
teacherClass.general.customClassNameHint: Use free text for club or custom groups. Use standard mode below for regular classes.
teacherClass.general.academicYearHint: This is defined in admin panel; teacher panel is read-only.
teacherClass.general.languageHint: Students in this class will use the panel in this language.
teacherClass.general.descriptionHint: Short info shown to students and parents.
teacherClass.general.dangerHint: Deleting class permanently removes enrollments, challenges and submissions tied to this class.
teacherClass.assignments.card.imageOrVid: Image or video · max {sec} sec video · {rounds} rounds
teacherClass.assignments.card.plannedHid: Planned - students do not see yet
teacherClass.assignments.card.studentsWi: Students will be notified at start time.
teacherClass.assignments.editFreeHint: In planned/draft challenge you can edit all fields.
teacherClass.assignments.editLockedHint: In live challenge, start and round count are locked; other fields can be updated.
teacherClass.assignments.editOpenAtHintF: For planned challenge, start and deadline are required; start must be before deadline.
teacherClass.assignments.editOpenAtHintL: This challenge is live; to edit start date it must be planned.
teacherClass.assignments.editRoundLocked: This value cannot be changed for live challenge.

teacherClass.stars.pastStarsHint: We’re building an archive of past weeks — it’ll show up here soon.
teacherClass.stars.whyChosenBody: {name} led the class in the last 7 days with {count} submissions, and keeps growing on the learning path.

teacherClass.stars.monthReportFooter: Students with at least one challenge submission are driving class momentum — keep it up!

teacherClass.stars.subtitle: Students with most submissions in last 7 days; growth points and badge level are shown.

teacherClass.kindergarten.title: Pre-primary daily board
teacherClass.kindergarten.subtitle: Pick a student below first; attendance, meals, naps, notes, and parent summary appear in one panel — no wide horizontal table.
teacherClass.kindergarten.boardHint: Edits apply to the selected student only. The parent summary goes only to that student’s parent.
teacherClass.kindergarten.pickStudentHin: Use the dropdown or the quick class list; fields show for one child at a time.
teacherClass.kindergarten.cardRowHint: The summary below goes to this student’s parent.
teacherClass.kindergarten.dateHint: The board loads for the selected day.
teacherClass.kindergarten.planHint: Short plan for the day (can appear in parent summaries).
teacherClass.kindergarten.emptyStudentsD: Use the Invite tab to add students via parent email or share link.
teacherClass.kindergarten.slotsEmptyHint: Add rows for multiple meals or naps; each row has a label and yes/no.
teacherClass.kindergarten.notePlaceholde: Short note (may be used in parent summary)
teacherClass.kindergarten.bulkEventsHint: Pick who the action applies to. For one child, use the panel above.
teacherClass.kindergarten.bulkMarkPresen: All enrolled marks everyone present. For meals/naps for arrivals only, switch target (after you have marked who came).
teacherClass.kindergarten.bulkSharedNote: Same day note for everyone in target
teacherClass.kindergarten.bulkDigestConf: Send end-of-day notifications to parents for target students who already have a daily record?
teacherClass.kindergarten.bulkDigestHint: Students without a record for this day are skipped.
teacherClass.kindergarten.subtitleV2: Quick attendance, meal, and nap from cards. Marking “at school” notifies parents. End the day with a bulk summary below.
teacherClass.kindergarten.boardHintV2: ○ Attendance: unset / here / absent. Meal: tap for none → half → all. Nap: unset / slept / did not. Absent cards fade.
teacherClass.kindergarten.planSummaryTog: Class day plan (optional, may appear in parent summary)
teacherClass.kindergarten.advancedBulkNo: Advanced: same note for target group
teacherClass.kindergarten.fabEndDayConfi: Send end-of-day summary and push notification to parents for all target students who have a daily record?
teacherClass.kindergarten.summaryPending: End-of-day parent message not sent yet

teacherHomework.title: Homework Management
teacherHomework.pageSubtitle: Pick a class, publish homework, open submissions from each card.
teacherHomework.listSubtitlePickClass: Select a class on the left first.
teacherHomework.emptyFiltered: Nothing matches this filter. Try another.
teacherHomework.kpiTotalBody: All homework records for the selected class
teacherHomework.kpiSpotlightFoot: You're managing homework for this class.
teacherHomework.sliderHint: Tap an image for fullscreen, arrows, and delete.
teacherHomework.pendingUploads: To be added when you save
teacherHomework.noStudentUploadsHint: The student may not have uploaded any, a parent may have removed the last image, or an upload may have failed. Check the parent/student side.
competitionDetail.notFoundOrUnauthorized: You cannot view this competition or it was not found.
competitionDetail.roundInfo.single: This topic has a single challenge step.
competitionDetail.pendingTeacherHint: Waiting for teacher approval. Once approved, you can invite classmates from here.
competitionDetail.pendingParentHint: Waiting for parent account approval. Once approved, only you can join this freestyle competition.
competitionDetail.freeBody: This competition is not open to classmates; only you participate with parent approval. You can continue your challenge submissions from the student projects/challenges flow.
competitionDetail.inviteFriendsBody: You can invite the whole class at once or pick students one by one. Accepted invites join the competition.
competitionDetail.inviteWindowClosed: Competition has not started yet or already ended; you cannot send new invites now.
competitionDetail.inviteAllHint: Already joined students and pending invites are skipped.
competitionDetail.notMemberHint: You are not part of this competition yet. Accept an invite from notifications or the competitions list.
competitions.proposalHint: Like teacher homework, you propose one topic and choose how many challenge steps it has (Challenge 1, 2, ...). Class mode may have limits; freestyle mode requires parent approval.
competitions.classModeRequiresClass: You need a class enrollment for class competition; join a class first via teacher invite.
competitions.freeModeHint: You need a linked parent account in your profile. Parent approves from Kids parent panel; no classmate invites in this mode.
competitions.yoursHint: All your competitions are listed here; open one for details and invites.
competitions.emptyYours: You do not have any competition yet. Use the form on the left to send a proposal.
projectDetail.savedLoadError: Saved submission could not be loaded
projectDetail.roundLocked: You must complete Step {round} submission first.
teacher.panel.schoolClassesLoadError: School classes could not be fetched
teacher.panel.noClassWithoutSchool: Add your school from the left steps first, then pick it in the same card to create your first class.
teacher.panel.noClassWithSchool: Select your school and set grade/section in the left card to create your first class; then open the class page for parent invites.
teacherProjectDetail.loadError: Could not load challenge or submissions
teacher.panel.descriptionHint: Optional. You can write age group, time, or focus area.
teacher.panel.descriptionPlaceholder: What will be done in this class?
teacher.panel.afterCreateHint: Then open the class to add parent invites and challenges.
childrenStatus.subtitle: Pending parent approvals are at the top; use the tabs below for challenges, homework, and test results.
childrenStatus.mockupHeroSubtitle: Discover what happened in your children's learning journey today. You're with them every step.
childrenStatus.mockupEmptyTab: No records for this tab yet.
childrenStatus.mockupPreschoolHint: Open the detailed section below for pre-primary daily records and follow-up.
childrenStatus.mockupAnalyticsHeadline: Learning momentum is building this week.
childrenStatus.mockupAnalyticsBody: We summarize weekly test and homework completion in the chart. Open each child's card for full detail.
childrenStatus.mockupBadgeEarned: Congrats — this badge also appears on the child's panel.
childrenStatus.mockupBadgeHint: When children earn badges, they will show up here.
childrenStatus.mockupConsultantBody: Use messages and the expert channel for school and activity communication.
gameCenter.title: Game center
gameCenter.subtitle: Play educational games for your class level, earn points and badges. Which game will you shine in today?
gameCenter.difficulty.title: Difficulty
gameCenter.question: Question
gameCenter.word.selectInOrder: Select letters in the correct order
gameCenter.hub.greetingSub: Ready to explore new worlds today and power up your mind?
gameCenter.hub.universeSub: Pick a door to reach the stars!
gameCenter.hub.wordBadgeTeaser: Play to get closer to the Word Master badge!
gameCenter.hub.leaderboardHint: Class leaderboard is coming soon. For now, keep growing your XP!
gameCenter.memory.coachMore: You're doing great! Can you find {n} more matches?
gameCenter.games.hafiza-kartlari.title: Memory cards
gameCenter.games.hafiza-kartlari.descrip: Train attention and memory with matching cards; find all pairs.
gameCenter.games.hafiza-kartlari.instruc: Tap cards to find pairs; matching cards stay face up.
gameCenter.games.hizli-toplama.title: Quick addition
gameCenter.games.hizli-toplama.descripti: Build speed and accuracy with addition; level up step by step.
gameCenter.games.hizli-toplama.instructi: Pick the correct answer and keep your streak.
gameCenter.games.hizli-cikarma.title: Quick subtraction
gameCenter.games.hizli-cikarma.descripti: Get faster and more accurate at subtraction.
gameCenter.games.hizli-cikarma.instructi: Choose the right answer and continue the series.
gameCenter.games.hizli-carpma.title: Quick multiplication
gameCenter.games.hizli-carpma.descriptio: Practice times tables and mental multiplication.
gameCenter.games.hizli-bolme.title: Quick division
gameCenter.games.hizli-bolme.instruction: Pick the correct quotient and move on.
gameCenter.games.kelime-avcisi.title: Word hunter
gameCenter.games.kelime-avcisi.descripti: Tap letters in the right order to build the word.
gameCenter.games.kelime-avcisi.instructi: Complete the word from the shuffled letters.
gameCenter.games.sekil-eslestirme.title: Shape match
gameCenter.games.sekil-eslestirme.descri: Pick the target shape quickly to sharpen focus.
gameCenter.games.sekil-eslestirme.instru: Each round, select the shown shape to advance.
projectDetail.videoTooLong: Video is too long (about {current} sec). Maximum is {max} sec.
projectDetail.videoDurationOk: Duration looks good (~{current} sec). Do not forget to paste the link below.
projectDetail.maxImages: You can add up to {count} images.
projectDetail.notFound: This challenge was not found or not assigned to you.
projectDetail.submitModeSteps: 📝 Step-by-step text submission + 1 image per round.
projectDetail.submitModeBoth: 🎬📝 Video limit: {max} sec · You can choose image or video
projectDetail.windowNotStarted: Submission window has not started yet. You can submit after the start time.
projectDetail.windowEndedReadonly: Submission window has ended. Content below is read-only; new submissions and edits are disabled. Teacher feedback remains visible.
projectDetail.windowEnded: Submission window has ended. You can no longer submit or edit this challenge.
projectDetail.starBody: Teacher highlighted this submission in this challenge. It will also appear on the badge path.
projectDetail.missedWindow: You did not submit before the deadline for this challenge; submission can no longer be added.
projectDetail.readonlyCompleteNoEdit: You sent all steps; you can't edit your submission here.
projectDetail.reviewHintPendingBody: Your submission was received; you'll see feedback here when it's ready.
projectDetail.reviewHintShineBodyFallbac: You did an amazing job; your effort really shows.
projectDetail.reviewHintGrowBodyFallback: Good start; we can work on a few things together.
projectDetail.reviewHintParticipateBodyF: This time it may not have been a perfect match; keep trying — that really counts.
projectDetail.videoRequired: Video submission is required for this challenge.
projectDetail.stepsRequired: Step-by-step text submission is required for this challenge.
projectDetail.stepPlaceholder: What did you do? Write here...
projectDetail.imageHint: JPEG, PNG or WebP · 1 image per round
projectDetail.caption: Short explanation / summary
projectDetail.explorerTipFallback: Read the goal and materials carefully and follow your teacher's hints!
projectDetail.mascotSnapBodyImage: Our mascot Buddy is ready to see your findings. Upload your best shot!
projectDetail.mascotSnapBodyVideo: When your video is ready, paste the link on the left and mind the time limit.
projectDetail.mascotSnapBodyText: Write your steps on the left and add a short summary. Happy exploring!
projectDetail.fillThisRound: Please complete all fields for step {n} first.
projectDetail.stepperComposeHint: This topic has {n} steps. You can move back and forth; you will send everything once at the end.
projectDetail.addStepDashed: Add one more step to this challenge
parent.panel.gameControlBody: Set daily minute limit, time window, and game-based permissions per child.
parent.panel.noChildSummary: No linked child summary yet. If registration via teacher invite is complete, refresh; if issue continues contact support.
parent.panel.chatStartNotice: Messaging will start for {student} with teacher {teacher} ({class}).
parentControls.title: Parental controls
parentControls.subtitle: Manage your children's game time, allowed hours, and game permissions here.
parentControls.heroSubtitle: Guide your child's digital journey safely. Adjust screen time and game access here.
parentControls.gamePermSectionSubtitle: Per-game access for the selected child
parentControls.noGames: No games available for this child.
parentControls.childSummaryHint: Child summary: game status is shown separately for each child.
parentControls.openAllForSelected: Open all games for selected child
parentControls.closeAllForSelected: Close all games for selected child
childrenStatus.preschoolMonthHint: Pre-primary daily records for the selected month.
childrenStatus.preschoolEmpty: No pre-primary daily records for this month. The child may not be in a pre-primary class, or the teacher has not entered anything yet.
childrenStatus.testAutoSubmitted: Time ran out; the test was submitted automatically.
teacher.panel.needSchoolFirst: You need to add a school first
teacher.panel.needSchoolFirstBody: It looks like this account has not yet been assigned a school by admin. A class must be linked to a school.
teacher.panel.needSchoolStep1: Assign the teacher to a school from the admin panel.
teacher.panel.needSchoolStep2: After assignment, school selection will open on this page and you can create a class.
teacher.panel.needSchoolFooter: School management is temporarily available only from the admin panel.
teacher.panel.createNewClassBody: Select your school, choose grade and section, then save. A separate class record is created for each academic year.
teacher.panel.noClassInSelectedSchool: No classes yet in the selected school.
schools.subtitle: Pick your school from the MEB directory and save; if missing, add it manually. Province and district stay aligned with MEB data in both flows.
schools.teacherOnlySubtitle: Schools are defined by admin and assigned to you. You can view assigned schools below and edit name/address if needed; contact admin to add a new school.
schools.teacherOnlyCardBody: New school records and quota management are available only in the Admin panel. Your assigned schools appear on the right.
schools.pickHint: First select province and district, then find your school in the list. If not found, create one with Add school.
schools.mebSchoolHint: When you open the list, you can narrow it with the search box.
schools.schoolNameHint: Shorten or correct if needed; this text will be used in the record.
schools.noMebSchoolInDistrict: No record for this district in MEB list. You can add your school with the button below.
schools.manualAddHint: Province and district are still selected from the MEB list; you only enter the school name.
schools.noneTeacherOnlyDesc: If your assigned school is not visible, contact admin.
schools.noneDesc: Pick from MEB on the left or add a school; then select it while creating a class.
teacherProjectDetail.challengeDetailSumm: Challenge details - purpose, materials, submission type (click)
teacherProjectDetail.submissionType.imag: Image or video - video max {sec} sec - {rounds} separate challenges
Image - {rounds} separate challenges - 1 image per round
invite.parentFlow: First a parent account (email + password) is created; the child does not need their own email. Easiest path to child panel: parent login -> switch to child panel. Optionally the child can also log in with username + child password. Parent session will be used for future content approvals.
invite.parentEmailHint: Parent login and notifications are sent to this address. A separate username is created for child login.
admin.title: Admin - teachers and schools
admin.subtitle: Create teacher accounts here; manage schools and student limits. Teachers cannot create schools - assignments are done by admin.
admin.teacher.createdAndMailed: Teacher added and login details sent by email.
admin.class.teacherAssignedBySubject: Teacher assigned to class with subject.
admin.errors.studentCapMinOne: Student limit must be at least 1.
admin.errors.demoDatesRequired: Start and end dates are required together for demo.
admin.errors.demoDateOrder: Demo end date cannot be before start date.
admin.errors.mebSchoolAddFailed: Could not add school to MEB list
admin.errors.teacherSubjectMissing: Teacher subject is not defined. Select a subject from teacher card first.
admin.schoolAssign.label: School assignment (optional)
admin.schoolAssign.searchPlaceholder: Search by school name, province or district...
admin.form.subject: Subject
admin.hint.addSchoolBeforeTeacher: Add a school below first; then you can link the teacher while creating the account.
admin.classAssign.title: Assign teacher to class
admin.classAssign.subtitle: After creating the teacher account and choosing a subject, link them to a class here.
admin.teacher.emailFailedToast: Email could not be sent.{detail} Share the temporary password with the teacher securely: {password}
admin.toast.mebSchoolCreated: School added to MEB list. It is now selected above; save with student limit.
admin.toast.mebSchoolExisted: This school was already in the MEB list. It has been selected above; save with student limit.
admin.subjects.title: Subject management
admin.subjects.subtitle: Manage the subject list shown for class assignments.
admin.certificate.title: Certificate targets
admin.certificate.subtitle: Manage weekly/monthly certificate step targets for the student panel.
admin.schools.sectionSubtitle: For demo and sales schools the main control is the student limit. When full, new students cannot register.
admin.schools.newSchoolSubtitle: Pick province and district and find the school in the MEB list. If missing, create a manual record with "Add school".
admin.schools.mebListMissingBefore: No MEB school list in the database. On the server run
admin.schools.demoToSalesHint: You can switch from Demo to Sales here.
admin.schools.managedByCap: Records for this school are managed by the single student limit.
admin.schools.addModalBody: If the school is not in the MEB list, add province, district and name here. Then pick it from the MEB list above and create the school record with student limit.
admin.schools.modalNamePlaceholder: Official or short name you use
teacherProjectDetail.submissionsHelp: On mobile each round is a narrow row; tap to expand (accordion). On wide screens rounds appear side by side. Tap the left block for a student to see all rounds (thumbnails + text). Tap an image on the card for fullscreen. After saving, if another is queued the next submission opens. "Not submitted" lists enrolled students who never sent a submission for this challenge.
teacherProjectDetail.emptyMissing.noEnro: No enrolled students in this class.
teacherProjectDetail.emptyMissing.allSub: No enrolled students are left without a submission; everyone appears to have submitted at least once.
tests.report.avgAmongSubmittersHint: Average score among students who submitted
tests.report.classWideAverageHint: Whole class; students who did not submit count as 0
tests.reports.pdfNewTab: Open report in new tab (print / PDF)
invite.emailLockedHint: Registration will use the parent email from the invitation; you cannot change it here.
invite.phoneHint: Digits only; if you start with +90 it will be normalized. Optional.
schools.addModalTeacherBody: If the school is not in the MEB list, add it here. Province and district are taken from MEB data in the system.
schools.shortNamePlaceholder: Official or short name you use
marfi.loginWelcome.title: Welcome back!
marfi.loginWelcome.body0: We will learn great things today, are you ready?
marfi.loginWelcome.body1: So happy to see you! Where shall we start?
marfi.loginWelcome.body2: Welcome! Your points are waiting, let's go!
marfi.loginWelcome.body3: Awesome! Want to get a new achievement today?
marfi.dashboard.morning0: Good morning! A new day, a new chance — let's go!
marfi.dashboard.morning1: Starting early takes courage. You can do it!
marfi.dashboard.afternoon0: Look how much you've done already! Keep it up!
marfi.dashboard.afternoon1: Afternoon break is over, let's get back to it!
marfi.dashboard.evening0: Evening workers are always one step ahead!
marfi.dashboard.evening1: You can finish one more task before today ends!
marfi.dashboard.noHomework: No homework today — but challenges are waiting!
marfi.dashboard.pendingHomework: You have pending homework, finishing them will earn you points!
marfi.dashboard.allDone: All tasks complete! You are amazing!
marfi.dashboard.newBadge: You're close to a new badge, keep going!
marfi.dashboard.highScore: Your points are reaching legendary levels! Awesome!
marfi.bubble.tip0: A little practice every day leads to great achievements!
marfi.bubble.tip1: Be curious, ask questions, learn — that's the best journey!
marfi.bubble.tip2: A lesson learned from a mistake is the most valuable lesson!
marfi.bubble.tip4: You are much more talented than you think!
marfi.roadmap.locked: Earn more points to unlock this badge!
marfi.roadmap.current: This is your goal! Let's walk toward it!
marfi.roadmap.noStars: Complete challenges to get stars from your teacher!
marfi.homework.allDone: All homework done! You are a champion!
marfi.homework.hasPending: You have pending homework! You will earn points when done.
marfi.homework.noHomework: No homework right now — use this time wisely!
marfi.homework.encourageStart: Starting a task is like finishing half of it. Go!
marfi.tests.ready: Tests are waiting! Every question is a new opportunity.
marfi.tests.hasPending: You have unfinished tests. Start when you are ready!
marfi.tests.goodLuck: Focus, read carefully and do your best!
marfi.challenges.welcome: Challenges make you grow! Which adventure shall we start?
marfi.challenges.inProgress: You have ongoing challenges, keep going!
marfi.challenges.tryNew: Try a new challenge and discover your talents!
marfi.proje.welcome: You will learn amazing things in this challenge!
marfi.proje.keepGoing: Every step brings you closer to the goal!
marfi.proje.almostDone: Almost done! One last push, let's go!
marfi.proje.submitTip: Check your work carefully, then submit!
marfi.odev.due: This homework is due soon, are you ready?
marfi.odev.submitted: Homework submitted! Great job, I am proud of you!
marfi.odev.notStarted: You haven't started yet — begin with a small step!
